assess_scope: - The skill covers LIFF (LINE Front-end Framework): liff.init(), liff.getProfile(), liff.sendMessages(), liff.closeWindow(), LIFF plugins, Pluggable SDK, LIFF CLI, and browser environment differences.
- Do NOT trigger for: Messaging API bots/webhooks, LINE Login OAuth (non-LIFF), LINE MINI App specifics, LINE Notification Messages.
improve_scope: - The skill covers LIFF ONLY: all liff.* APIs, LIFF browser vs external browser, LIFF plugins/Pluggable SDK, LIFF CLI, LIFF development and debugging.
- NOT: Messaging API, LINE Login OAuth flow (outside LIFF), LINE MINI App submission, LINE Notification Messages.
